title: Polarizer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the weapon|the [[Bowcaster/Legends|bowcaster]] [[Polarizer (component)/Legends|component]]}}
[[File:Jeigh_Esse.jpg|thumb|right|[[Jeigh Esse]] holding her polarizer.]]
The '''polarizer''' was a unique weapon created by [[Jeigh Esse]] out of a [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech]] [[EG-7 blaster]]. It was able to emit high-energy charges for several meters when fired. This weapon gave Jeigh great job satisfaction when she used it properly.

==Behind the scenes==
The polarizer was created by [[Chris Cowdrill]], a ''[[Star Wars]]'' fan, for the backstory of their [[Jeigh Esse]] entry in the [[Design An Alien]] contest held in the ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine]]s''.

==Sources==
